contents:
[package]
name = "taflzero"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
rust-version = "1.91"

[dev-dependencies]
csv = "1"

[dependencies]
rand_distr = "0.6"
js-sys = "0.3"
console_error_panic_hook = "0.1"
once_cell = "1.21"

[features]
default = [ "cuda", "directml",]
cuda = [ "ort/cuda",]
directml = [ "ort/directml",]
openvino = [ "ort/openvino",]

[lib]
crate-type = [ "cdylib", "rlib",]

[dev-dependencies.serde]
version = "1"
features = [ "derive",]

[dependencies.rand]
version = "0.10"
default-features = false
features = [ "std_rng",]

[dependencies.wasm-bindgen]
version = "0.2"
features = [ "serde-serialize",]

[dependencies.web-sys]
version = "0.3"
features = [ "Window", "Event", "CustomEvent", "CustomEventInit", "console",]

[profile.dev]
opt-level = 1
debug = true
overflow-checks = true
debug-assertions = true
incremental = true

[profile.release]
opt-level = 3
lto = "fat"
codegen-units = 1
strip = "symbols"
panic = "abort"
overflow-checks = false
incremental = false

[profile.profiling]
inherits = "release"
strip = false
lto = "thin"
codegen-units = 4

[target."cfg(not(target_arch = \"wasm32\"))".dependencies]
ndarray = "0.17"

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies]
tract-onnx = "0.23"

[target."cfg(not(target_arch = \"wasm32\"))".dependencies.ort]
version = "=2.0.0-rc.12"

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies.getrandom]
version = "0.4"
features = [ "wasm_js",]

[package.metadata.wasm-pack.profile.release]
wasm-opt = [ "-O3", "--enable-bulk-memory", "--enable-nontrapping-float-to-int", "--enable-simd",]

[package.metadata.wasm-pack.profile.dev]
wasm-opt = [ "-O0", "--enable-bulk-memory", "--enable-nontrapping-float-to-int",]
